3.11.1.manual_guidance: Request the most recent organizational risk assessment report. Verify it covers all systems processing, storing, or transmitting CUI. Confirm the assessment addresses current threats and vulnerabilities, includes likelihood and impact analysis, is updated at least annually, and incorporates results from vulnerability scans and security assessments.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the frequency to assess risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals is defined.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that the frequency to assess risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals are defined.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals resulting from the operation of an organizational system that processes, stores, or transmits CUI is assessed with the defined frequency.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: risk to organizational operations, organizational assets, and individuals resulting from the operation of an organizational system that processes, stores, or transmits CUI is assessed with the defined frequency.

aws.name: Amazon Inspector enabled
aws.expected: Inspector v2 enabled for EC2, ECR, and Lambda scanning
aws.remediation: Enable Amazon Inspector v2 for EC2, ECR, and Lambda vulnerability scanning.

aws.name: ECR image scanning enabled
aws.expected: Image scanning on push enabled for all ECR repositories
aws.remediation: Enable image scan on push for all ECR repositories.

aws.name: Vulnerability findings reviewed regularly
aws.expected: No critical/high vulnerability findings older than 30 days unresolved
aws.remediation: Review and remediate critical/high Inspector findings within 30 days.

azure.name: Defender for Cloud vulnerability assessment enabled
azure.expected: Vulnerability assessment solution deployed on all VMs
azure.remediation: Enable Defender for Cloud built-in vulnerability assessment on all VMs.

azure.name: Container vulnerability scanning enabled
azure.expected: Defender for Containers enabled with vulnerability scanning
azure.remediation: Enable Defender for Containers for container image vulnerability scanning.

azure.name: SQL vulnerability assessment enabled
azure.expected: Vulnerability assessment enabled on all SQL servers
azure.remediation: Enable SQL vulnerability assessment on all Azure SQL servers.

gcp.name: Web Security Scanner enabled
gcp.expected: Web Security Scanner configured for web applications
gcp.remediation: Configure Web Security Scanner for all web applications.

gcp.name: Container Analysis vulnerability scanning
gcp.expected: Vulnerability scanning enabled for all container registries
gcp.remediation: Enable Container Analysis vulnerability scanning on Artifact Registry.

gcp.name: Security Health Analytics enabled
gcp.expected: Security Health Analytics active and findings reviewed
gcp.remediation: Ensure Security Health Analytics is enabled in Security Command Center.

aws.name: SSM Patch Manager compliance monitored
aws.expected: All instances show compliant patch state within policy timeframes
aws.remediation: Remediate non-compliant patches per SSM Patch Manager baseline.

aws.name: Inspector critical findings remediated
aws.expected: Critical findings remediated within 15 days, high within 30 days
aws.remediation: Establish and follow vulnerability remediation SLAs by severity.

azure.name: Update Management compliance tracked
azure.expected: All VMs show compliant update status
azure.remediation: Address update compliance gaps identified by Azure Update Manager.

azure.name: Defender recommendations addressed
azure.expected: No unaddressed critical security recommendations older than 30 days
azure.remediation: Address Defender for Cloud recommendations within defined SLAs.

gcp.name: OS Config patch compliance monitored
gcp.expected: All instances show compliant patch state
gcp.remediation: Remediate non-compliant patches identified by OS Config.

gcp.name: SCC critical findings remediated
gcp.expected: No critical SCC findings in active/unresolved state older than 15 days
gcp.remediation: Remediate critical Security Command Center findings within 15 days.
